description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and runs a before_script of "yarn" for every job. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a job named "test" that executes "yarn run lint" then "yarn test". In the deploy stage add a job named "pages" that runs "mkdir .public" followed by "node_modules/.bin/typedoc --ignoreCompilerErrors --out public/ passit_sdk/sdk.ts", publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only.
